title: Survival Rework
description: Make survival harder by adding new mechanics and changing existing ones.
body:
# 📖 About

Make survival harder by adding new mechanics and changing existing ones.

**Changes:**
- Wooden tools have been changed to flint tools![flint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b60ea1d6890f49234603031424469c6a1a0c47d3.png)
- Stone tools changed to copper tools![copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bf570ee92b77af0d352df7b92fb954f455cacd6.png)
- Changed healing system![heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4aca67d3d58267e03c24098e39d98a98dbcc416.png)

**Additions:**
- Added bleeding effect![blood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3b5cbfd0f5e41f010ad4abbb6e2420e03921272.png)
- Added bone fractures![bone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d570cee641b81a4ffc197bd809120153dab7a36d.png)
- Added thirst bar![thirst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ea5b4f71fbf046bbf70fdcf885de5f85b9c8769.png)
- Added temperature bar![temperature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c338868657fdd709726b8d997fcdd7b42ba4d5a.png)

# 💡 Wiki
If you want to learn more about this datapack, you can check out the [Survival Rework Wiki](https://github.com/JustJabka/Survival-Rework/wiki)
